channel.title: Machine Learning on Akhil Nasser
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Akhil Nasser

item.title: Project 3: Santander Customer Transaction Prediction
item.description: Inspiration Project Objective Baseline Human Level Performance Since this is a strucutred data we cannot easily establish a Human Level Pefromance Benchmark. Implementation Details Since this is a Kaggle Dataset Results Further Ideas References (1): Photo by Beatriz Pérez Moya on Unsplash
